entities.name: GLOBAL HEALTH RESEARCH
entities.description: Research focused on improving health and achieving equity in a global context

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL COLLABORATIONS
entities.description: Partnerships between researchers from different countries to conduct health research

entities.name: LOW-INCOME AND MIDDLE-INCOME COUNTRIES
entities.description: Countries with lower economic development where research is often conducted

entities.name: DATA COLLECTION
entities.description: The process of gathering information through interviewers, gatekeepers, and translators

entities.name: LOCAL RESEARCHERS
entities.description: Researchers from the target countries who are often marginalized in the scientific process

entities.name: SHORT-TERM CONTRACTS
entities.description: Precarious employment arrangements without long-term security

entities.name: HEALTH AND SOCIAL INSURANCE
entities.description: Protective benefits provided to workers to ensure wellbeing

entities.name: ORGANISATIONAL STRUCTURES
entities.description: The framework and management of research projects

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL, POLITICAL, AND MACROECONOMIC CHALLENGES
entities.description: Systemic difficulties within a target country that affect research operations

entities.name: HIGH-RISK AND DEPRIVED SETTINGS
entities.description: Environments characterized by danger and lack of resources

entities.name: PROJECT-LEVEL SUPPORT INFRASTRUCTURE
entities.description: The resources and support systems provided by a research project to its staff

entities.name: MENTAL HEALTH AND PHYSICAL WELLBEING
entities.description: The psychological and physical state of the researchers

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT GOAL 8
entities.description: A global goal promoting sustained, inclusive and sustainable economic growth and decent work for all

entities.name: DECENT WORK
entities.description: Work that is productive and delivers a fair income, security in the workplace and social protection
